entry.title: Re: Down payment with Resource related billing not consid...
entry.content:
Hi Ken,

i got the flow which you have given. But want to know after completing all necessary customization in mentioned notes and as per given process in notes, after executing DP91 down payment amount should be reduced while generating debit memo. This is not happening. So want to know why it is not working. If anything more either from customization or process needs to be done ?

I have the example in my first post.

entry.title: Re: SAP Trail Datasphere Analytical models are not appear...
entry.content:
Hello,

did you check what development tools are saying ? (error Code in browser ect)

Sadly the error message handling in cloud tools overall is pretty bad, you have to check the Networktab of the Development tools of the Browser to get more information about the error that occurs.

BR
Julian

entry.title: Unable to create BTP trial account
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am having trouble creating BTP trial account since yesterday.

Anyone having any idea or experiencing similar issue?.

Regards,

Rahul R

entry.title: Re: SAP Trial installation stalling on unbuntu
entry.content:
Hi,

how long you have been waiting. This step usually takes a while.

entry.title: Re: E Mail Header and E mail Body not in proper format fo...
entry.content:
Dear Krishna,

I hope you doing great. If I see you screenshot I see 2 points the email body which looks to me like the generic email text and the email subject.

Both can be configured via the form , Maintain email subject, maintain email template for the body.

This works. If you still struggeling please open a case and adress the case to me.

 

Best regards

 

Didi

entry.title: Scheduling agreement target quantity
entry.content:
Hi, 

Regarding the scheduling agreement(ME31L, ME32L, ME33L), there is a target quantity. 

I was under the impression that the orders could not be placed after reaching the target quantity, but I've heard that orders can still be processed beyond this limit. In this case, I'd like to understand why the target quantity needs to be entered.  What is the function of the target quantity? 

 

Thank you for your consideration.

entry.title: Debug Mode(/H) history
entry.content:
Hello!

I use the SE16N_CD_KEY table to see if the user changed the data through the DEBUG mode(/H).

Are all date changes in the DEBUG mode recorded in the SE16N_CD_KEY table?

If someone modify the data through DEBUG (in normal case), it always leaves a record in SE16N_CD_KEY, right?

Thanks for all.

entry.title: Hello
entry.content: Hello SAP Community, my name is Vera Kirby, and I am a seasoned consultant specialising in SAP Security and GRC. I have been residing in sunny Perth, Australia for more than 13 years but I originally come from Russia. I am eager to share my knowledge and expertise with the SAP community through my upcoming blogs.

entry.title: Re: Corporate applicants to the digital skills initiative: Tell us your story!
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano after reading several blogs I can see SAP is promoting Cloud based solutions to new customers. So ,I want to start with certification in Public cloud.

I have completed learning journey in "Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" and planning to do the certification in same.

entry.title: Re: Integrating Employee Central With Concur via Integration Center
entry.content:
Hi Rafael, 

This all work well until you have names with special characters like éàäöèü, etc. 

Concur expect UTF8-BOM format but the Integration Center do not let you chose what encoding you want. As solution we added a conversion in the integration to replace all these characters but this is really 90s technology. Any way around this ? 

Thanks, 

Christopher

entry.title: Re: BAPI for CRM Provider Contract Creation
entry.content:
* Set control parameters, because COMMIT must be done after all orders are created without error
ls_control-commit_after_save = abap_false.
ls_control-submit_order = abap_true.
ls_control-save_with_errors = abap_false.
ls_control-save_order = abap_true.
ls_control-no_init = abap_true.

entry.title: Re: Question regarding the installation of DAA in a clust...
entry.content:
Hi Appuru,

I would request you to go through the below links and decide on the diagnostics installation process.

Agent-on-the-fly for HA Support | SAP Help Portal

1365123 - Installation of Diagnostics Agents - SAP for Me - check attachment.

Please pay special attention to physical/virtual hosts and logical hosts setup in your scenario. Apply below general rules for agents on the fly installation:

In a HA (Switchover scenario) context: For ASCS/ERS and DB.

- Install on ALL Physical or Virtual Hosts (part of the group) one Diagnostics Agent (latest version, see prerequisites section) without specifying any Logical hostname in SWPM.

- No further diagnostics agent required on any logical hosts.

Outside HA (Switchover scenario) context: For App servers.

- If no logical hostname is used on physical/virtual host, then install only one diagnostics agent per host without specifying any logical hostname in SWPM.

- If low number of logical hosts run on physical/virtual host, then install one diagnostics agent per logical hostname and specify relevant logical hostname in SWPM.

- If high number of logical hosts run on physical/virtual host, then install one diagnostics agent on the underlying physical/virtual host without specifying any logical hostname in SWPM.

Hope this helps.

Regards,

Kishan

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Thanks for you informational Blog Post.

I am delighted to express my strong interest in participating in the digital skills initiative by SAP Learning! As a Graduate from a remote area in India, I understand the challenges of accessing economic opportunities and quality education in my region. This initiative presents an incredible opportunity for me to gain valuable skills within the SAP Ecosystem and kick start my career in the technology industry.

I will promptly create an SAP account using the provided guidelines and join the beginner corner to engage and seek support during my learning journey.

I'm being part of a consultant I'm much happy to see this event. The areas and service that sap is providing is uniquely serves best efficient for business and to use as I tried to explore, .With the announcement of chance supports my self in lightening up and taking my service to next level which drives as #RISE with SAP . Loves to hear makes me inspires more that boosts my colleagues too

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh vs. SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
entry.content:
This blog focuses on the differences of the "SAP Event Mesh" versus the powerhouse "SAP Integration Suite - Advanced Event Mesh" which will help to make an informed decision to optimize event-driven integration within your organization's specific requirements. 

Event-Driven Integration in the Digital Age

Modern businesses navigate a data-driven landscape, demanding seamless integration between ever-expanding application portfolios. Traditional methods struggle to keep pace, necessitating a shift towards real-time, event-based integration approaches.

SAP's Event Mesh vs. Advanced Event Mesh, IS

SAP offers two compelling solutions for event-driven integration: SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh (AEM), and SAP Event Mesh. While both leverage event brokers for integration, they cater to distinct use cases.

AEM goes beyond basic integration, offering robust event management capabilities. It empowers you to:

  • Govern the events throughout their lifecycle, ensuring data integrity and compliance
  • Design, publish, and discover events, fostering collaboration and reusability
  • Deploy flexibly across various public clouds (AWS, Azure, GCP), on-premises, or at the edge
  • Maintain data consistency through event transactions
  • Replay messages for troubleshooting or new applications
  • Handle large payloads and storage for demanding use cases

On the other hand, SAP Event Mesh provides a lightweight solution for the core event streaming and integration. It would be great choice in below scenario's:

  • Simple integration scenarios within the SAP ecosystem
  • Cost-effective implementation with usage-based pricing
  • Straightforward deployment on SAP Business Technology Platform

In conclusion, One can choose right fit based on below pointers - 

1. Complexity - AEM tackles the complex event-driven architectures, while Event Mesh targets simpler integrations

2. Event Governance -  AEM prioritizes event management for control and compliance

3. Deployment -  AEM offers broader deployment options, while Event Mesh resides within SAP BTP

4. Data Volume - AEM handles larger payloads and storage for extensive data flows. AEM Can handle message size upto 30 MB with a storage of 6TB while Event Mesh can handle message size upto 1 MB with a storage support of 10 GB

entry.title: Re: System News: Customizing the My Home news feed
entry.content:
Interesting blog. I wonder how this works On-Premise. According to the official documentation the newsfeed should work there too: https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/a7b390faab1140c087b8926571e942b7/8a60279e8d2041b5ad8d3455fab0f3ef.html.

We have enabled in on one of our systems and we can configure one specific feed via the Flexibility Services. But the documentation doesn't mention anything about the administration of this news feed using a RASD-tool. Anything I look up seems to refer to the Cloud version.

entry.title: Re: Purchasing group field in quality notifications
entry.content: Thank you for the idea, Nilesh. Here are the results of my check. I created a notification of type Q2 manually and could change the purchasing group then. Then I also created manually a notification of the custom type X2 that we use for vendor defects and the purchasing group was changeable too. The field is only unchangeable in notifications created from results recording for an insp. lot. I need to check with the users how they initiate QN from results recording. I'll be back in this forum.

entry.title: SAP CAP Deployed application UI returning Not-Found error
entry.content:
I have deployed a CAP Application with UI and Approuter. When I test the application locally the UI is visible and the service is accessible. When I deploy the app to BTP, it is not loading the welcomFile mentioned in approuter xs-app.json. It is giving 404 not found error.

Folder structure

 

 

UI xs-app.json

Approuter xs-app.json

The UI was generated automatically. No changes are done so far

 

Error

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps QR Code generation issue on mobile device
entry.content:
Hi Dan,

I took your qrcode.jpg link and added it to my app quickly ( the third one). You see, if it is a clear image (ending in .jpg) it works.

Essentially my two other qr codes are api calls. The response unfortunately is a "svg+xml" response, not a ".jpg".
Let me explain what is happening with the two qr codes.
1. QR code with an orange border: this one takes the response from the URL (svg+xml) converts it to an base64string, then I decode it to an image url (looks like this: data:image/svg+xml;base64,PD94bWwg[...]).

2. QR code with light blue dotted border: this one is the URL itself with the response looking like this:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="279" width="279" class="pyqrcode"><path transform="scale(3)" stroke="#000" class="pyqrline" d="M4 4.5h7m1 0h5m4 0h4m4 0h1m2 0h2m6 0h1m2 0h1m1 0h2m3 0h1m1 0h3m2 0h1m1 0h1m1 0h4m1 0h2m3 0h1m1 0h2m3 0h1m1[...]</svg>

So I GUESS the SAP Build Apps preview has an issue with svg/xml responses. 
Do you have any workaround for me?

entry.title: Error when working with correction file during migration
entry.content:
Hi collogues

I am new in SAP, and my team is working on a project implementing ERP. I do some asset data migration using <Migrate Data Using Staging Tables> and at a point I have had an error with the uploaded file. The system suggested me to download a correction file and work with it, but when I try to upload the correction file I successfully go to all steps but when on the final step <Migrate> I receive an error: 

ANLB not updated : INTERN-00001 0 MM01

Migration Project: Asset Master Data migration test 
Migration Object: Fixed asset (incl. balances and transactions)
Occurred During:
Migrate Data: Completed with Errors
Activate item to go to section in page
 

Short Text

ANLB not updated : INTERN-00001 0 MM01

Diagnosis

Table ANLB has not been updated after the changes were made.

System Response

This asset will be missed out, processing will continue with the next asset.

Procedure

The error must be analysed (data base error?).

 
Technical Information
Error Message
 
Message Class:
AA
 
Message Number:
35

Please help, what should I do in this situation to solve the issue.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Telangana, India)
entry.content:
Note: Dear members, we have a registration capacity of 30 and the registration is now open. If you couldn't make it to the initial 30, You can request to be considered in the waitlist by leaving a comment on this event post. In event of any cancellations, we will inform you of the any available seat that gets freed up.

This SAP CodeJam event will give you a hands-on experience with SAP Build for building apps and business processes without code (Low Code/No Code). 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • We will also demo a business site in which you can embed the app (SAP Build Work Zone).

You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build artifacts, and get a deeper understanding of the following topics:

  • SAP Build Apps
    • Connecting to an ABAP, S/4HANA  and CAP service
    • Building UIs
    • Binding data
    • Navigation
    • Triggering processes from your app
    • Scanning barcodes and implementing other mobile capabilities
    • Filtering data

 

  • SAP Build Process Automation: 
    • Creating a process
    • Adding approvals
    • Implementing a rework scenario
    • Creating actions
    • Calling SAP backends (SAP S/4HANA Cloud and CAP services)
    • Updating data
    • Conditions and GoTo flows
    • Custom variables

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Wednesday, Jun 26th from 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM hours local time in India (IST). The language of the event and the content will be English.

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • Complete these prerequisites BEFORE you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam 

Location

Event Address: 

Tata Consultancy Services, Blocks SDB1 & SDB2, Sy. No. 255(Part Ibrahimpatnam Mandal, Adibatla, Telangana 501510

The number of seats is limited to 30.

The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates @eshrinivasan and @ajay_soreng

The event is kindly being hosted by Tata Consultancy Services – thank you! Please note that spaces are limited – we can only accommodate 30 attendees. If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section. The participants who signed up from this page will receive an email from the instructors/host for entry into the office premises to attend the event.

entry.title: Re: Purchasing group field in quality notifications
entry.content: I have seen that the users add defects on the UD screen and this creates the QN. Does it ring a bell? I can't find any setting in the code catalog 9 (defects) that would limit updates to certain fields.

entry.title: Re: How to select BOM components in sales order based on...
entry.content:
Hi @snigdhodeep.

AVC engine is only used for high-level configuration. BOM explosion and dependencies in the BOM are sill executed by classical VC.

Therefore, you must ensure that you choose classical VC instead of AVC when you create selection conditions and procedures that shall be assigned to BOM items.

Should be a VC selection condition in your case.

Br,

Michael

entry.title: Re: Please kindly help me to configure outside discovery...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

For Outside Discovery SAP Host Agent, please execute the following command:
> usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/saphostctrl -function ConfigureOutsideDiscovery -enable -sldhost <> -sldport <> -sldusername <> -sldpassword <>

Then, check the result of following trace for the detailed information:
> usr/sap/hostctrl/work/outsidediscovery.log (trace)

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: As a partner, how do we know when to offer v2 over v1?
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently if you buy S/4HANA Public Cloud Premium Edition, we will offer 15 free Sales Cloud v2 users 🙂
Or you could also buy it independently.

For more detailed information, please kindly contact your Sales Rrep.

Thank you!

Best Regards,
Molly

Mohan.

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with Spaces and Pages
entry.content: Hi Ankita, if you are coming from classical home page with groups and you personalized groups, you should have a button to import apps. The video My Home in this series shows this (from minute 3 approx.).

entry.title: Optimizing Production Timing with Freight Order-Based Date Adjustments in SAP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am looking for a way to adjust the confirmed date in a sales order based on the freight orders. The goal is to ensure that the production is completed as close to the loading date as possible. Production is driven by the sales order and its confirmed date.

The idea is to plan freight orders based on the sales orders in TM and then use this information to adjust the confirmed date in the sales order accordingly. Which would then influence production.

Is this possible? Is Advanced TM necessary? Would there be a more advisable approach to achieve this?

Thank you for your insights!

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh vs. SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi

It would probably make sense to mention that event mesh is "now" a service in Integration Suite. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/meet-your-new-friend-emis-event-mesh-in-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/13731129

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
My week 2 submission:

word1='Australia'
related_word1='Canberra'
word2='USA'
 
Result:
USAWashington_DC0.7220002249341672

 

which is the correct capital city

But when word2 = 'Spain'

We get


SpainCatalan0.865680415938654

M

entry.title: Architecture Decisions for Treasury Management
entry.content:
Summary

When planning target architecture based on business capability assessments, the Financial Service Provider Management, Debt and Investment Management and Commodity Risk Management (Finance --> Treasury) capability under the SAP RBA (Reference Business Architecture) model has multiple solutions. This leads to the requirement to understand how the products are relevant in terms of capability fulfillment and what is relevant for specific target architecture.

This article provides an overview of related evaluation and solution criteria related to solutions to support these capabilities.

Business Requirements

The Treasury Management solution provides capabilities to help companies optimize their capital structure, make informed investment decisions and mitigate financial risks to maximize returns and safeguard financial stability.

Solution Options

SAP’s Broad Portfolio for Treasury and Working Capital is depicted in the diagram below.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Of these, the ones listed under the RBA capabilities other than core TRM in SAP S/4HANA and the scope of this article are the following.

  1. SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity
  2. SAP Digital Payment Add-on
  3. SAP Market Rates Management
  4. SAP Trading Platform Integration
  5. SAP Broker Reconciliation for Commodity Derivatives (not listed above)

Characterization of the Solution Options

1. SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity (MBC)

The SAP MBC solution provides different options to connect corporate customers and banks. SAP MBC is a cloud based digital connection integrating payments processes between SAP S/4HANA and Financial Institutions. It supports direct member banks that are part of the SAP MBC ecosystem as well as banks that are not members. This is summarized in the below diagram.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

SAP S/4HANA also provides overlapping capability with the SAP Bank Communication Management solution which also supports SWIFT integration. In line with the cloud-first strategy, SAP MBC is the leading solution to be discussed with customers.

2. SAP Digital Payment Add-on

The SAP Digital Payment Add-on allows for connecting Payment Service Providers (PSP)s to receive and account for payments against receivables. The add-on provides out of the box integration with all the major receivables generating modules such as Sales, Finance, Contract Accounting, BRIM, etc. in SAP S/4HANA. The scope of PSP support is available in here - PSP Scopes.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

3. Market Rates Management

SAP Market Rates Management provides the capability to access and manage various types of market data such as currency exchange rates, etc. from SAP S/4HANA. There are multiple options available for the use of this solution.

  1. Get market rate data from Refinitiv and use them productively in your landscapes.
  2. Get up to ten types of market rates, including credit and basis spreads and volatilities, from a single download endpoint.
  3. Upload your own market rates by using the upload endpoint.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

4. SAP Trading Platform Integration

SAP Trading Platform Integration enables the integration of SAP S/4HANA trading activities into trading platforms, covering both outbound trade requests and inbound process for trades.

5. SAP Broker Reconciliation for Commodity Derivatives

SAP Broker Reconciliation for Commodity Derivatives is SAP's cloud-based solution for reconciling exchange traded commodity derivatives with trading and clearing broker statements. The solution runs on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP).

The PAM currently shows that mainstream maintenance ends in 2024 with no successor product. Inclusion in target architecture should be subject to validation with product development.

Criteria to determine the most suitable Target Solution

The core capabilities for SAP S/4HANA Treasury and Risk Management (TRM) within SAP S/4HANA are complemented by the solutions discussed above based on the business requirement discussed against each of them. The target architecture will therefore consist of SAP S/4HANA TRM complemented by one more of these solutions as relevant.

Decision Tree

A classic decision tree is not proposed in this case as the target solution architecture components address different business needs within the capability and this has been explained with the solution characterization.

Summary

The key component of target architecture to support capabilities under Treasury Management requires an evaluation of specific business functions against the capabilities.

As an example, does the capability for Financial Service Provider Management require a solution to integrate with trading systems as well as handle market data feed? Also, the Market Rates Managment solution may also be relevant for customers that do not explicitly spell out the need for managing a service provider, such as for exchange rates import.

It is for this reason that this article looks at solutions across multiple capabilities under the ambit of Treasury Management.

entry.title: Re: ABAP BW RSA1 Tcode program
entry.content: The report GP00O2TFYNDOTDPHTKVD03SV7S5 is the generated code of a transformation. The header of this report should show the corresponding transformation ID. To change the custom code, you must edit this transformation.

entry.title: Re: Loops in BTP workflows
entry.content: Hi @tobias_breyer, can you please elaborate on how we can implement the simple loop? How the sequence flow would repeat until a condition is true/false. Any sample workflow?

entry.title: Re: X.509 login in SAC
entry.content:
Hi, the authentication process using X.509 client certificates against the SAP ID Service is not supported in option 1. Therefore, you need to switch to option 2 and enable SAC as a SaaS application for SAML to outsource authentication to an IDP of your choice. Typically, most customers already have an existing IDP.

We recommend using the SAP Identity Cloud Services (IAS) as the primary IDP for all your SAP applications. Although SAC is one of the few SaaS applications not bundled with SAP Identity Cloud Services, if your customer has the BTP, they can establish two tenants for free and attach SAC to it. Once SAC forwards authentication requests to your IAS tenant, you can enable X.509 authentication.

Please note that you will need to create an incident with SAP and provide your PKI chain for import into the IAS to support mTLS authentication. If you prefer to use IAS as a proxy, you can delegate authentication to another IDP such as Entra ID, ADFS, Okta, Ping, etc., and set up X.509-based authentication for your users using existing smart cards for strong authentication.

Cheers Colt

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Kjetil Kilhavn here, doing the "Tour of the SAP Community 2024". I have been working as an ABAP and Business Workflow developer since February 2000. Along with several other workflow developers I was fairly active on SAP Developer Network for a while, but became less active when I felt the community became so obsessed with welcoming new members that content quality was sacrificed in the process.

I never left the online SAP developer community completely, of course, but my level of engagement became and still is lower than it once was. Time will tell whether this new platform can lead to a renewed engagement for myself.

entry.title: Re: Lead Management: Create Lead only with contact and wi...
entry.content:
Hi,

Leads could be created without an existing Account if the "Use Existing Account" button is not enabled.

If you see that your Use Existing Account indicator is marked as true, grayed for editing and Account Field is made mandatory, this is probably due to the scoing question "Do you want to use the existing account for lead creation?" is scoped in your tenant.

Please kindly check on it and you may refer to this KBA: 2308706 - Lead Creation using Existing Account 

Thank you!!

Best Regards,
Molly

entry.title: Re: Analysis for Office - Logon was successful - Loading...
entry.content:
Hi @tilted 

There’s information about a root cause in Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3481865  “The blocking was caused by a change on June 13 on BTP Token API on all landscapes. this change was reverted on June 14.”

regards, H

entry.title: Re: MS Excel From SAP
entry.content:
In the screen shot
Col A: Order Number:  text autom. displayed but has key here one single order is selected with its 1:n
Col B: Equipment No: text autom. displayed, all have keys,  "null" values arrise from the fact, that the Equipment text is not maintained except for the last entry
Col C: Engine No: no text setup in IOBJ, 1:1 relation to Equipment

I checked and played with the settings in the underlying query and changes in default display (key ot text (s/m/l)) have no impact on the display in Excel.
If set on key as default, I would expect that keys are displayed. If not Text is maintained despite default on text, I would expect that the key is displayed, because <null> is not a flaw but straight out logically wrong(!).

Using the ODBC interface on the same view you get for each column an addition "__T" column.

entry.title: Re: Running Your Own Blockchain on The SAP BTP Kyma Trial: A Hands On How To Guide 🚀
entry.content: I think the yaml indentation disappeared 😞

entry.title: What address to choose in SAP Learning Hub subscription as a single individual?
entry.content:
Hi together,

I was planning on doing the SAP Analytics Cloud-course "Hands-on Practice for SAP Analytics Cloud: Foundation (https://learning.sap.com/practice-systems/sap-analytics-cloud-foundation)". When I try to purchase the necessary Learning Hub subscription, I get asked for a company address during the step "Create a company account".

I don't have one. I'm currently not working for a company and wanted to subscribe for myself.

So, what address should I enter, if I don't have a company address? Can I enter my personal address, or is it not possible to subscribe, if you are not working for a company? I already sent a mail to support, but haven't received an answer yet.

Thanks for the help.

entry.title: Re: HANA instance access within steampunk instance for "S...
entry.content: Thanks @HakanHaslaman

entry.title: Is it best practice to assign a Work Order ALWAYS to EQ, or sometimes to FL?
entry.content:
We are configuring our SAP EAM assets in such a way that Equipments (EQ) always have a corresponding Functional Location (FL), so that we assign functional attributes to FL and physical attributes to EQ.

Question: is it advisable to assign Work Orders (for inspections, maintenance etc) always to the EQ, or maybe sometimes to the FL? My guess would be to the EQ (since you can always find the statistics over time on the FL, even when the EQ has been replaced, by seqrching for all current and hisotric EQ's on the FL). But I am interested in whether anyone has different views.

entry.title: Re: Guide in a needed middleware integration with SAP
entry.content:
The best tool for integrating SAP data formats (like Invoices, Orders, etc.) with external third-party systems is in my opinion SAP Business Connector. Especially if you prefer an on-premises solution.

It already comes out-of-the-box for many tools for IDoc&RFC processing, XML processing, data mapping and internet communication protocols (HTTPS, Email, FTP, JDBC). Can be installed in 5min on a standard desktop/notebook, so you can easily experiment and try out some first prototypes. Take at look at the "SAP Adapter Guide" and the "Developer Tutorial" on the documentation page:
​https://support.sap.com/en/product/connectors/bc/details.html?anchorId=section_295234589

There is also an Installation Guide, but on Windows, you pretty much just start the installer (as Administrator), and it does everything for you. Make sure to install the latest updates right after initial installation, to have the latest bugfixes and features, see notes
3448291 (CoreFix 3)
3346188 (Service Release 4)
(There are two separate patch lines, one for the general internet tools, and one for SAP-specific tools.)

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP S/4HANA authorizations into SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Dear all,

the objects described in this blog post have now been released as SAP Community Content and can be found here.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup
Embedding Reports in Sales Cloud V2
entry.content:
In V1 it was possible to embed report views in Objects.

How will this be solved in V2, since everything is done via embedded SAC.

Up until now we do not see any option for embedding report views in objects?

entry.title: Compare the values of one or more establishments chosen by the user with those of the entire group
entry.content:
Hello,
I need to create a dashboard with several indicators, and for some of them, I need to compare the values of one or more establishments chosen by the user with those of the entire group.
For a single establishment, I have no problem: I have added a query with a prompt for the chosen establishment that I retrieve later, and I use a “where” clause for the indicators. But if the user chooses more than one establishment, all the formulas give me “multiplevalues,” which makes sense.
I tried using a variable with the codes of the selected establishments with “inlist,” but it doesn’t work.
Am I required to create one query for the group and a second one for the chosen establishments?

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: Eclipse local history is empty
entry.content: Yet another PBCAK: the local comparison option only comes up in the editor context menu, not in the navigation tree! After initially failing to get it working with a fairly recent version I retraced all the steps and noted that I was clicking in the wrong place, out of habit. It works ok even on our fairly old system, thankfully.

entry.title: Re: Command Line Shortcut to Logon to SAP via GUI
entry.content: perfect solution,thanks Joseph!

entry.title: Hi i want to download the Recent PCE Rule set of S4/HANA Private Cloud Edition.
entry.content: Hi i want the latest PCE ruleset for Private Cloud Edition, Share the Link or Guidance for the same.

entry.title: Re: How to prevent a sales order in C4C to retransfer to...
entry.content:
Hello,

Any changes of Sales Order triggers a synchronization with ERP. Any modifications to Sales Order, like Sales Order creation via email, instigate a synchronization process in our ERP system. This means a record is created in our backend system whenever an Sales Order is altered. 

This process cannot be monitored on a field-level basis due to our existing system architecture. It is a standard procedure that operates automatically upon order amendments to ensure the correct and up-to-date data.

Thank you for your understanding 🙂

Best Regards,
Molly

entry.title: Re: Purchasing group field in quality notifications
entry.content:
HI Rafael,

In customizing you can set the fields as display, required, ect.

Use the path in SPRO: 

IMG - Quality Management - Quality Notifications - Notification creation - Notification type - Define screen templates

By using 'influencing' you can set it per Notification type.

greetings, Herman

entry.title: Re: Mandatory field SQVI
entry.content:
Hello Avichay

thank you for your inquiry below.
Unfortunately your question is not related to SAP Mobile Start but the underlying application that you are showing in your screenshot. Therefore, I would like to ask you to contact the owner of this application to discuss your requirement.

I hope this helps.

Best regards
Robert

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
Funny examples indeed.

In the case of Jupiter, it referred to the city in Florida, whose neighbor is Palm Beach. This is where SAP TechEd on Tour takes place alongside ASUG Tech Connect in November https://events.asug.com/event/9a5f27ca-d742-45bb-85e7-a6597b952900/summary, but who knows, maybe we will have it on the Moon still during our lifetime 🤓

And in the case of name+surename for Luke, it might related to the name+surename of the music producer Nick Yoda.

entry.title: Re: Loops in BTP workflows
entry.content: Hi Sumit, our editor is BPMN compliant, so from the visual side, you can use many BPMN tutorials on the Internet. Also, the "Exclusive Gateway" approach is quite similar to many control flow modeling styles, as the outbound flows from there usual have the meaning "continue" or "leave/stop looping". With respect to the condition, it's like with programming languages: you have to refer to something in the condition that is updated somehow (but usually during the loop cycle), otherwise the loop would not terminate. In workflows, this can mean various things. If the BPMN loop simulates a typical for-loop that just counts the loop iterations, you would increment a counter (using a script task), and the condition would check whether the counter has reached the number of loop iterations required.

entry.title: Re: What's New in Q2 2024 for the Release Navigator for SAP BTP
entry.content: I have to say that the page layout and how the controls are used in the Release Navigator is very confusing. Some tiles just display text content, some have links, some are scrollable, some are for navigation. Why not stick to the Fiori Design Guidelines and use some Page Design which is common in the SAP World, like an Object Page with sections?!

entry.title: Re: Demystifying the Common Super Domain for SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
can you confirm we can't undo CSD upgrade on preview tenant ?

we have experienced problem with instance refresh due to CSD and of course we are past the 30 days limits to undo it thru upgrade Center.

 

thanks

Philippe

entry.title: Re: Running Your Own Blockchain on The SAP BTP Kyma Trial: A Hands On How To Guide 🚀
entry.content:
Hi Remi,

it is a shame, I wrote this blog 3 times because 3 times during saving of the blog the whole formatting disappeared and in the end I was just happy that I could save it and publish it, and apologies to readers for the look and feel of the blog.

Regarding the Yaml file, the Yaml content, the expectation is that Readers will take that text and create their own Yaml file from it and do the indentation.

But, as I wrote, anybody who walks through this guided procedure, if you get stuck, write the problem in the comments and our Team will take care that your problem is solved and you get this up and running because a Blockchain Database, on the SAP BTP Kyma Trial is something very cool and opens up a wealth of tech and innovation and cyber security opportunities for you.

Bye the way, soon the Yaml file won't be needed as we are created a batch .bat file to run the whole procedure and so the deploying Blockchain on the SAP BTP Kyma will become even easier.

All the best,

Andy.

entry.title: Re: SAP Workflow CustomAttributeData
entry.content:
Hi Sje,

yes, custom attributes data are bound to the version of the workflow instance and to the very task instance. The values are recorded per task instance, on task creation, so that you will have new attributes only on task instances that were created using the changed workflow definition. And that in turn means that you need to start a new workflow instance which takes the active / last workflow definition as its blueprint.

entry.title: Re: Error Occured while genrating ABAP Repository Objects for Database Table
entry.content:
Hello,

would you mind to provide the release, on which you use the Object Generator?

However, for a quick solution, the better way is to open an incident on corresponding component with system access. So we can reproduce the issue directly in the system and provide a fix.

Kind Regards,

Nadine

entry.title: Print Template in SAP Dm not visible
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Hope you all are doing good. 

I want to highlight a problem, which Im facing during the print function in DM. 

I download the Discrete Print templates from SAP notes and uploaded it in Manage print documents app. As seen in Image Print01.

 

But when I do a GR posting and try to print out the confirmed posting, I see this error as seen in Image Print02. The template is not loaded. Could any one please help me out here.

Thank you in advance and looking forward for your replies. 

Kind Regards,
Sayuj.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM's own disk usage and CPU usage cannot be checked
entry.content:
When SAP Cloud ALM itself is targeted as a health monitoring item, I can see the HAMA Memory Size and other memory usage items, but I cannot see the Disk Usage and CPU Usage items.
I would like to know how to check this.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM's own disk usage and CPU usage cannot b...
entry.content:
The full information is captured in KBA 3482856.
In short, SAP Cloud ALM does not currently offer metrics "CPU Usage" and "Disk Usage" when monitoring the SAP Cloud ALM tenant itself. 
You will need to create an SAP Customer Influence request to tell the Developers that you want these metrics for your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.

entry.title: Re: ADT project login KeePass auto-type but nothing typed...
entry.content:
Today, the solution posted 2 days ago (uninstalling the ZIP files in C:\Users\... instead of C:\Program Files\...) doesn't solve anymore.

But I could make it work by running KeePass via "Run as Administrator", which I can do implicitly as follows:

  1. Properties > Shortcut > Advanced:
  2. Select "Run as administrator"

entry.title: A cycle is found in the calculation chain of the key figure.
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am raising a new question on this topic, as the other topics were quite old and perhaps things have changed in the meantime.

I have a request to create three different calculated key figures, at the same planning level, with below oversimplified calculation :

KF1 :

- current period = KF a + KF b (both stored KF's)

- future periods = KF 2 at period -1 

KF 2:

- current period = KF1 + KF c (stored KF)

- future periods  = KF1+ KF3

KF 3: 

- all periods : max (KF2, KF d (stored KF))

 

I have tried multiple ways to create the KF's : creating separate KF for current period / future periods , using PeriodShifting, CAGGR, helpers, creating a duplicate planning level , but the end results was always the same: cycle is found.

I believe the KF's need to *know* the values for all horizon in order to work and it does not consider that they can start to be calculated with current week and move forwards. Even though i am restricting the values of the KF's using PERIODID's, it does not play a part in the planning area check.

Has anyone came into the same scenario recently? Is there a way to solve the request, w/o using copy operators?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

My name is Anita. I wanted to take part because I want to re-skill. 

I've previously worked as a professional singer, a customer representative, a Level 1 technical support agent and a social media moderator. After spending the last 4 years taking care of my daughter, I'd want to establish  a new career.

After getting the following certifications; Comptia A+, BCS foundation in Business Analysis. I believe that learning SAP would be ideal for me to achieve my goals. In the end I'd like to become a SAP consultant.

I live in the UK, I'm bilingual in French and English. I'm a woman who is also part of a minority. I have a French high school Baccalaureat.

Thank you for your consideration

entry.title: Re: SAP Trail Datasphere Analytical models are not appear...
entry.content:
Hi Julian,

Thanks for your reply.

I have checked the error but not able to actually get the cause of the issue.

message: "Bad request while calling RepositorySearch. Query: /repository/search/$all?&$select=deployment_name,business_name,creator_user_name,deployment_business_type,id,space_description,space_name&whyfound=true&$count=true&$apply=filter(Search.search(query='SCOPE:SEARCH_DESIGN ((kind:EQ(S):\"deployedObject\" AND (deployment_business_type:EQ(S):\"DWC_CUBE\" OR deployment_business_type:EQ(S):\"DWC_FACT\") AND exposed_for_consumption_id:EQ(S):\"true\" AND space_name:EQ(S):\"GE098144\")) (deployment_name business_name creator_user_name):()'))&$orderby=deployment_name ASC&$top=60&$skip=0"

entry.title: Re: Communication Arrangement Check Connection Failed
entry.content:
@SGHave you received a solution? I have similar issue.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/outbound-communication-to-s4-on-premise-odata-from-btp-abap-environment/qaq-p/13731217/comment-id/4833251#M4833251

entry.title: New Customer Engagement Initiative for SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management
entry.content:
Link to Customer Engagement Initiative:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3712

 

Description of Planned Project

Automated, no-touch invoice processing is the ultimate goal of many companies when it comes to the target picture of an efficient invoice management process. While automation rates are constantly increasing due to technological progress, it is still often required and sometimes even desired to let AP accountants review a supplier invoice and make manual adjustments before posting that invoice in the financial system for payment.

SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management, inbound processing module on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) is an invoice management solution seamlessly integrated with S/4HANA Cloud, public edition. In order to support AP accountants in their daily work, this solution needs to provide users all the relevant information and features to complete their responsibilities when processing a specific invoice. The already available invoice object page – the main object an AP accountant works with – enables users to view and edit header and item level information of the uploaded or electronically received PO based and non-PO based invoice.

SAP Product(s) in Focus

SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management 

SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management, inbound processing module

Project Goals and Activities

With the planned SAP Customer Engagement Initiative project, we would like to get input from existing or potential customers of that solution on how we can further improve the invoice object page. What additional features could customers envisage so that information gaps can be closed and so that a user’s need to navigate to other transactions for required information would be minimized? We would like you to work with us and to validate and prioritize the features for upcoming releases with us. Exemplary topics we would like to emphasize during the project are the display of supplier master data and the entry of payment details. With this CEI, we want to identify critical user pain points we need to solve and how we should prioritize these pain points.

Format of Activities, Estimated Effort

  • Initial kick-off call: 30-45 minutes
  • Virtual workshop: solution presentation/demo and brainstorming session in order to cluster and prioritize topics for upcoming deep dives
  • 2-3 virtual workshops (max half day) or one longer onsite workshop (1-2 days) depending on participant availability in order to deep dive on max 3 focus topics
  • Closing Call: one hour

entry.title: External Learning User IAS Migration
entry.content:
Hello community,

I did all the recommended Steps in the SAP Help sites for external Learning User Migration: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_LEARNING/82cf7c83c7db42a8aa1d3bbdbc39e93d/e03e7ec93f7e4861b8cf10721c41134a.html?locale=en-US

I synchronzied the external Learning Users to IAS. The Users are available with correct GUID, email-address, UserID etc. passwort has been sychronized.

When I go to Learning Administration > Activate Identity Authentication > 1.Data Setup Check was successful > 2. Migrate Existing Learning-Only Users was confirmed.> 3. Test SAML and User Migration

The window to authentificate to IAS is coming up. I am ablte to set a new password.

When I try to login I receive the message:

We couldn't log you in.

Please contact your system administartor.

Error Invalid Login.

 

I am in discussion over 2 month with SAP support with no success. Do you have some idea what I can check to solve the issue?

Thanks a lot in advance,

Manuela

entry.title: Extend existing Cost Center migration cockpit template
entry.content:
According to business requirements, custom fields such as Service line, BAU/Change and Locations has been added to the cost center master data in SAP public cloud using custom field app. The fields are published. Status of the fields are enabled on the manage cost center app and it's ODATA service. 

Assumption was migration cockpit will automatically detect custom fields added in the cost center master data while creating a new migration project and subsequently add it in the corresponding template. However custom fields are not being added to the template. Is it expected behavior? 

Furthermore, as per migration object documentation, custom field support is not applicable to the cost center. 

As we have business requirement to add custom fields in the cost center object, and since the cost center migration object does not support custom fields, what is the alternative for uploading custom field data?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Extend existing Cost Center migration cockpit template
entry.content:
Custom field addition is currently not supported in Cost center object. So you cannot use migration cockpit for this requirement. We are constantly improving on enabling the migration object with custom fields exposure. You can find the list and more details in the below KBA : https://me.sap.com/notes/3216716
I had a check with our CO- team and able to understand there is a API exist and you can have a more look to understand whether this API can fill in your requirement.

https://api.sap.com/api/COSTCENTREREPLICATIONBULKRQ/overview

entry.title: Wht Tax Base amount difference between FB03 and F110
entry.content:
Hello Colleagues,

I am using Extended Withholding Tax. I posted invoice document and Withholding Tax Base Amount is 3000 IQD (Doc. C), however in F110, it posts 2958,10 IQD.

The difference occurs, Please share your thoughts.

entry.title: What is the table for requirement date in SAP PS?
Re: Starting and shutting down Appliance from AWS console
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

It is not recommended, because VM management via Cloud Provider Console will result in inconsistent state of SAP Cloud Appliance Library appliance.

Best regards,

Tsvetinka

entry.title: Re: Modify Z* Db table not working
entry.content:
INVNO is part of the primary key so

  • If already in the table, you update with this same value, do you change other fields (try to add a changed on/by field) else nothing to see
  • If it's not in the table it will insert a new record (also if there are already wrong records in the database table, especially wrong format of key fields)

NB: Basically, only an unique secondary index can trigger a sy-subrc <> 0 for statement MODIFY dbtab (LOB doesn't seem relevant here)

Do you use an explicit DB commit or are you relying on an explicit DB commit ?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
My name is Thabo Arnold Sentle, and I am currently a SAP Basis Administrator based in the vibrant and diverse country of Botswana. Over the years, I have dedicated myself to ensuring the stability, efficiency, and security of SAP environments. This role has been immensely rewarding, offering me deep insights into the technical backbone of SAP systems and a profound appreciation for the meticulous work that keeps these systems running smoothly.

However, I believe in continuously evolving and challenging myself, which has led me to a new career aspiration. I am eager to transition into a role as an HR specialist with a focus on Configuring SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core. This shift aligns with my passion for human resources and my commitment to leveraging technology to enhance organizational effectiveness and employee satisfaction.

The decision to pivot from a technical role to HR is driven by my desire to be at the intersection of people and technology. Human resources play a critical role in any organization, and I am inspired by the potential of SAP SuccessFactors to transform HR processes, making them more efficient, transparent, and user-friendly. By becoming certified in Configuring SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core, I aim to gain the skills and knowledge necessary to implement and manage solutions that empower HR teams and improve employee experiences.

The SAP community has always been a source of inspiration and support for me. It is a space where professionals share knowledge, tackle challenges, and celebrate advancements together. I am excited to bring my technical expertise and enthusiasm for HR to this community, contributing to discussions, learning from experienced peers, and supporting others on their SAP journeys.

I am enthusiastic about the journey ahead and confident that my dedication, combined with the support of this incredible community, will enable me to achieve my goals. I look forward to connecting with fellow SAP professionals, exchanging insights, and contributing to the vibrant discussions that make this community thrive.

Thank you for your support and encouragement as I take this exciting step towards becoming an HR specialist and a certified SAP SuccessFactors expert.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Unpivot Data In HANA Using a Graphical Calculation View
entry.content:
In HANA SQL, You can achieve this with a more elegant code implementation.

for example.

SELECT
STUDENT_ID,
MAP(element_number,
1, "ENGLISH",
2, "MATHS",
3, "PHYSICS") AS "SUBJECT"
MAP(element_number,
1, ENGLISH,
2, MATHS,
3, PHYSICS) AS "MARKS"
FROM STUDENT,
SERIES_GENERATE_INTEGER(1, 1, 4)
ORDER BY STUDENT_ID, element_number

entry.title: Re: ABAP BW RSA1 Tcode program
entry.content: GP* programs should not be adjusted manually as they are generated programs for various things. Open the transformation to which this program belongs to and make the necessary adjustments in your custom routine(s) from the Transformation editor.

entry.title: Re: SAP Trail Datasphere Analytical models are not appear...
entry.content:
So what you pasted there is the Odata (request) URL from SAC to DSP, that should deliever the Result back to SAC.

However this Request failes with Error Code 400. (200 would be good)

4xx Http Error code means client problems (so you 😉 )
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_HTTP_status_codes

Did you try different Browers ? Maybe you have plugin or extenions that is causing Problems.

entry.title: Re: External Learning Request Configuration / Customization - SAP SF LMS - Guide
entry.content:
Hi all,

My issue is that the total amount, instead of adding, multiplies the costs. What's wrong here?

Many thanks in advance

#ExternalLearningRequest

entry.title: Not list operating costs in Profit & loss platement for Euro( Czech Republic\ Poland \ France)
entry.content:
HI ALL

I come from China. And I have a customer which is a global company and it have some sub factory in Czech Republic\ Poland \ France.

They asked me a question: The profit and loss statement issued by their EU company does not have operating costs, and the material cost + labor cost + other expenses shown in the statement, may I ask whether such a statement is really required in the income statement of Eastern Europe?

As for the material cost shown by them according to the development report (which obtained the material consumption data of the material account), the audit thinks that the current credit number of the inventory account is needed to sort out the material cost, do you have any similar project experience in issuing statements?

thanks in advance.

Darcy

entry.title: CK40N auto create material cost view

Hi experts,

When I use CK40N ,the material cost view was created.I need prevent it auto create.

someone can help me?

 

Thans everyone

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve

entry.title: Re: Hide error message in C4C
entry.content:
Hi Krithika,

We would suggest that a case could be created for it, so that we could check in the backend on the error message to see where it is raising 🙂 

Thank you!

Best Regards,
Molly

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: Welcome @John23 - I hope you enjoy exploring SAP Community. Be sure to subscribe to SAP Managed Tags for your topic areas of interest!

entry.title: Re: Loops in BTP workflows
entry.content: Thanks @tobias_breyer for the explanation. I am new to BPMN flows. Now I have seen some sample workflows. As far as I understood, there is one flow with 'default' and another flow with a condition going out of the exclusive gateway. If we have to repeat any step or set of steps, we need to simply put the conditioned flow back just before the desired steps.

entry.title: Re: Using Market Segments in Margin Analysis
entry.content:
Hello Catherine,
For Product Group 1, 2,....

You can use a table lookup rule in KEDR with the followings:

Source:
MVKE-MATNR: Material Number, MVKE-VKORG: Sales Organization, MVKE-VTWEG: Distribution Channel, KNVV-SPART: Division
Target:
MVKE-MVGR1: Material group 1, MVKE-MVGR2: Material group 2, ...


For the Customer group1, 2, ...
You can use a a table lookup rule in KEDR with the followings:

Source:
KNVV-KUNNR: Customer Number, KNVV-VKORG: Sales Organization, KNVV-VTWEG: Distribution Channel, KNVV-SPART: Division
Target:
KNVV-KVGR1: Customer group 1, KNVV-KVGR2: Customer group 2, ...

Both of these rules work under Margin-Analysis.
Hope this helps,
Soufiane

entry.title: Call external API from custom action in SAP Fiori Element
entry.content:
Hi,

I've developed a SAP Fiori Elements List report application. I need to call an external API when the user select a row in the list. I've defined a custom action but I don't know how to call external API

The API is the url for trigger a SAP Build Process Automation flow. So the requirement is trigger process automation flow when the user select a row in the list

Anybody can help me?

Thank you.

Piervincenzo.

entry.title: Re: Purchasing group field in quality notifications
entry.content: Thank you, Herman. This I have already checked. Neither the notification type nor any other field has such influence on the Purchasing group field in this IMG option (trs OQM1). It is something with the fact that the notification is created from defect reporting in UD.

entry.title: Re: How to synchronize Set Controlling Hierarchies in SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi, 

have you tried the autoreplicate flag in transaction HRY_REPRELEV? 

From the help of the field: 
Changes to group are auto replicated to HRRP

The Auto Replicate flag determines if changes to a set-based group is
automatically synchronized to Hierarchy Runtime Representation (HRRP)
tables.

Use

When a set-based group is set to Report Relevant, an initial version of
runtime hierarchy needs to be generated manually by using the Replicate
Runtime Hierarchy transaction (HRRP_REP). If any further changes are
made to the group later on, you can select one of the following options
to synchronize the changes to the runtime hierarchy:

o In transaction HRY_REPRELEV (Set Report Relevancy), select Auto
Replicate to update the runtime hierarchy each time when the group
is changed and saved.

o In transaction HRRP_REP, re-generate the runtime hierarchy

 

Thanks 

Best 

GIanluca

entry.title: Re: SAP Trail Datasphere Analytical models are not appear...
entry.content:
Yes, Julian I have tried other browsers and incognito mode as well, but still no luck.

Any workaround suggestions are highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Debug Mode(/H) history
entry.content:
AFAIK, Only for SE16N when using &SAP_EDIT

Read

  • Improvement request Consider SE16N-Changes with &SAP_EDIT in Firefighter Log Synchronization and Review 
  • 3042747 - AC12 : Collect SE16N changes 
  • 3029257 - Enhancement for Firefighter Log Review - Collect SE16N changes

entry.title: How to create AR aging reports using the "G/L Perspective of AR Aging Grid" CDS view
entry.content:
Do you need an overview of overdue receivables sorted by profit center or customer? Do you want to see aggregated overdue amounts by journal entry and journal entry item? Or do you need more aging intervals for your overview than those available in the Overdue Receivables app or the Total Receivables app?
This blog post will show you how to use the G/L Perspective of AR Aging Grid – Query (C_ARAgingGridGenLedgerQry) standard CDS view for this. For more detailed information about the CDS view, see G/L Perspective of AR Aging Grid - Query. 

To use the G/L Perspective of AR Aging Grid – Query standard CDS view for one of the above use cases, you just need to follow this three-part procedure consisting of creating an application, adding this application to a business catalog, and running your custom report:

Part 1: Create Application

  1. Open the View Browser app, search for the C_ARAgingGridGenLedgerQry CDS view, select the CDS view, and choose the Create Application button in the table toolbar.
    The following screenshot shows the search result for C_ARAgingGridGenLedgerQry and highlights the Create Application button.

  2. In the dialog box that appears, enter a report name in the Title field and a description in the Subtitle field.
    The following screenshot shows the dialog box that appears when you choose the Create Application button.

  3.  Choose the OK button.

    Your application is created.
    The following screenshot shows the application ID of your application.

Part 2: Add Application to Business Catalog

  1. To add your application to one or more business catalogs, click the application ID.
  2. In the dialog box that appears, choose the View in Catalog option.
    The Custom Catalog Extensions app opens.
    The following screenshot shows the dialog box.
  3.  In the Custom Catalog Extensions app, choose the Add button in the table toolbar to add your application to one or more business catalogs.
    The following screenshot shows the Used in Business Catalogs results table and highlights the Add button.

  4. In the dialog box that appears, search for the relevant business catalog(s) to add your application to, and choose the OK button.
    The system takes you back to the Used in Business Catalogs results table.
    The following screenshot shows the dialog box that appears when you choose the Add button.

  5. In the Used in Business Catalogs results table, select the business catalog(s) and choose the Publish button in the table toolbar.
    The following screenshot shows the business catalog that you added to your application and highlights the Publish button.
  6. In the confirmation dialog box that appears, choose the OK button.
    Once the status changes from Unpublished to Published as shown in the following screenshot, you are ready to run your custom report.
     

Part 3: Run Custom Report

  1. Log on to the system with a role that includes the business catalog to which you added your application in part two and open the App Finder to search for your custom report.
    The following screenshot shows the App Finder option in the User Actions Menu.
  2. Enter the name of your report in the Search bar. The tile for your application appears.
  3. To add the tile to one or more of your pages, click the + (Plus) sign on the tile as shown in the following screenshot.

  4. In the dialog box that appears, select the pages to which you want to add your application and choose the OK button as shown in the following screenshot.


    You can now find your application directly on the SAP Fiori launchpad as shown in the following screenshot.

     

  5. From here, start the application and run your report.
    The following screenshot shows an example:

Summary
We hope this blog post showed you how easy it is to use the G/L Perspective of AR Aging Grid – Query (C_ARAgingGridGenLedgerQry) standard CDS view to create custom AR aging reports.

If you don’t want to use all the fields defined in the standard CDS view or want to have different fields in the filter bar, we recommend creating a copy of the G/L Perspective of AR Aging Grid – Query (C_ARAgingGridGenLedgerQry) standard CDS view. To do so, you can follow the steps described in the Customer Aging and Supplier Aging Reports at the Line Item Level using Analytical Query in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition blog post.

Feel free to leave a comment on this post below. We’re looking forward to your feedback.

Related Information

G/L Perspective of AR Aging Grid - Query 
View Browser
Custom Catalog Extensions

entry.title: Re: How to synchronize Set Controlling Hierarchies in SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Gianluca,

Thanks for your answer.

unfortunately, for Funds Management object, we don't have this option (funds, funds center and commitment item)

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Thanks @KStrothmann for the quick blog for EMIS. 

The question I have, how is it priced now? Does it come free with the IS without any additional cost based on number/size of messages? 

- Anupam

entry.title: Re: SAP SAC Digital Boardroom - Unified story presentatio...
entry.content:
Hi @igdulia sorry this is a late post.. 

there's a really nice Blog over here that you can check out the functionality https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/presentation-mode-integration-of-core-digital-boardroom-features-in-the/ba-p/13616365

regards, H

entry.title: Re: End to end Configuration for Project Interest calculation
entry.content:

I'll update it until this weekend, but you may email Dushyantsap29@gmail.com with any particular questions.

Dushyant Singh
